rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of D 27, Llcs First Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: D 27 LLC VS. MARLENE J. CASISSA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT MARLENE J. CASISSA, IN TRUST,, MARLENE J. CASISSA, IN TRUST, DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege independent tort duty consistent with all elements discussed in Shapiro v. Sutherland (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 1534 and to allege misrepresentation with particularity.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALGOBIND JAISWAL ET AL VS. ALICE & OLIVIA CALIFORNIA HOLDINGS LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT ALICE & OLIVIA CALIFORNIA HOLDINGS LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED 5 days to answer. Moving party failed to show that any provisions of the Commercial Eviction Moratorium preclude the filing of a civil action for breach of contract or impose any limitations on such filings. Furthermore, Defendants failed to show that anything on the face of the complaint indicates that defendants are not in breach of lease per the terms of the lease or under San Mateo Community v. Half Moon Bay (1998) 65 Cal.App.4th 401 and Petroleum Collections v. Swords (1975) 48 Cal.App.3d 841. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1151 ALABAMA DEVELOPMENT GROUP, LLC. VS. EVA GARCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT DEBORAH CARLOS, SAMUEL ORTEGA, EVA GARZA MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is GRANTED. December 8, 2020 service is quashed. Plaintiff failed to carry its burden to show proper substitute service on 1159A Alabama Street tenants. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGINIA MERAZA-SANTOS VS. SARA MAE SWEENEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2020 line 10. PLAINTIFF VIRGINIA MERAZA-SANTOS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Requests for Productions must be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. If Defendant fails to comply with this order, sanctions are also sanctions are granted in the amount of $800 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. =(501/REQ)
